case_title: YIM,ROY H. VS CONTRERAS,ANA AVILES et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,509.29 FILED BY YIM,ROY H. AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS,ANA AVILES GOMEZ, THERESA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO ANA CONTRERAS RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YIM,ROY H. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ, THERESA $340.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $340.00, THERESA GOMEZ VOLUNTARILY SUBMITS TO THE COURT'S JURIS. & WAIVES DEFECTIVE SERV.RETURN ROD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DISMISS AS TO ANA AVILES CONTRERAS.
